titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Arnold G. Dana, Class of 1883, Yale College, Scrapbook Collection Titled "Yale: Old and New"
Dana (Arnold Guyot), Class of 1883, Yale College, Scrapbook Collection Titled "Yale: Old and New"
titlestmt.author: compiled by Daniel Hartwig

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Thursday May 16, 2019 at 08:15
finding aid revisiion description not supplied

did.unittitle: Arnold G. Dana, Class of 1883, Yale College, scrapbook collection titled "Yale: Old and New"
did.abstract: The materials consist of 102 scrapbooks (volumes 16-18 are missing) compiled by Arnold Guyot Dana concerning Yale. The scrapbooks, collectively titled "Yale: Old and New," document various aspects of Yale, including presidents, buildings and residential colleges, publications, departments and schools, sports, finances, and student life.

odd.head: General note
odd.p: Forms part of Yale Record Group 48-A (YRG 48-A), Yale pictorial records and collections.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The materials are open for research.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Patrons must use FILM HM 41 instead of the originals, except for volumes 16, 17, and 18, which have not been filmed.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Arnold G. Dana, Class of 1883, Yale College, Scrapbook Collection Titled "Yale: Old and New" (RU 867). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.

altformavail.head: Existence and Location of Copies
altformavail.p: The scrapbooks are available on microfilm (19 reels, 35mm.) from Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library at cost. Order no. HM41.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The materials consist of 102 scrapbooks (volumes 16-18 are missing) compiled by Arnold Guyot Dana concerning Yale. The scrapbooks, collectively titled "Yale: Old and New," document various aspects of Yale, including presidents, buildings and residential colleges, publications, departments and schools, sports, finances, and student life.

did.unittitle: Residential Colleges-Branford College Courts Entires Memorials
Residential Colleges-Saybrook College Courts Entries Memorials
Residential Colleges-Branford and Saybrook Life and Activities
Residential Colleges-Jonathan Edwards and Timothy Dwight
Yale and Her Books-Libraries on Old College Campus (*)

odd.head: General note
odd.p: See also: vol 20A-2 for Yale Alumni Reports and Official Documents

did.unittitle: Art Work by Students and Graduates
Yale Theatre and Its Plays B
Science-Origin of Applied Science-Yale Scientific School
Science-Zoology, Biology, Forestry Science, Zoology, Biology, Forestry
New Haven Hospital School of Nursing University Health
Sterling School of Medicine and New Hospital Buildings
Psychiatry and Child Hygiene (School of Medicine)
Bicentennial-the Pageant 1916: The Removal to New Haven Other Celebrations
Junior Societies and Fraternities Alive and Dead
Clubs B Debating Mory's Whiffenpoofs Graduates Faculty Yale N. Y.
Defunct Societies and Old Eating Clubs Sophomores and Freshmen
Yale Gym Yale Bowl Yale Field, etc.
War Years through World War I
